text.message: I dont know why red chose to challange me for this lol
i mean it makes sense for their position too
just hurts your game more if they get it
They could have exported and not made an enemy to be fair
You’ve got the 3:1 on the right. He doesn’t have any other port access
green are you really not going to play for real
Yea it was a good plow
but expect a few robs in return
Yall need to help me dev
If ima win i need to settle twice
Not gonna get vps when you got so many
Now I’m just feeding green infinite dev
Don’t want you to lose army
True but that might be unfair at that point
Black wins if you lose army
Currently they arr just feeding my army
Black im not gonna win now
The turn he double dev when you didn’t buy 1 was where we lost
Wp red for blocking me, your the reason I didnt crush
Not sure why you’re acting like this
I literally didnt block you at all
you got blocked once and decided to throw an entire game
ive blocked the six every chance Ive gotten
I ment you blocked the sheep port
Game was extended bc green fought army with my help
